schema_version.description: Version of the DITTO schema set this document conforms to

work_item_id.description: Stable identifier for a work item

question.description: The question the agent considered asking the user

why_needed.description: Why only the user can answer this

source.description: Where the agent tried to answer the question before asking the user

result.description: Evidence found, or the reason the source did not resolve it

items.description: One self-answer attempt that must precede asking the user (§6.2)

self_answer_attempts.description: Sources checked before asking; gate cannot be ask without these

decision.description: Outcome of the question gate evaluation

risk_if_not_asked.description: How the implementation result changes if this is not asked

question-gate.description: Pre-ask judgement that blocks unnecessary and responsibility-shifting questions (§6.2)
